Smithers, BC — Bulkley Valley

Growing Beautiful Spaces in the Bulkley Valley

Metta Growing brings passionate, hands-on landscaping to Smithers and surrounding communities. From lush garden installations to striking patios, we transform outdoor spaces with care rooted in this land.

What We Do

Full-Service Landscaping

From first consultation to finished project, Metta Growing handles every aspect of your outdoor transformation.

Hardscaping

Patio & Hardscaping

Stunning paver patios, garden pathways, and stone features built to last through Bulkley Valley winters.

  • Design & layout planning
  • Base excavation & prep
  • Paver/stone installation
  • Finishing & edging
  • Starting at contact for quote
Learn More
Garden Design

Landscape Installation

Custom garden beds, soil prep, and beautiful plantings chosen to thrive in our northern BC climate.

  • Custom plant selection
  • Soil prep & amendment
  • Mulching & edging
  • Seasonal planting
  • From $500
Learn More
Growing

Plant Starts & Seedlings

Indoor-grown starts for herbs, vegetables, and ornamentals — hardened off for northern BC's short growing season.

  • Indoor grown in Smithers
  • Herbs, vegetables, ornamentals
  • Hardy northern varieties
  • Available spring & summer
  • From $3/start
Learn More
View All Services
Our Story

Rooted in Smithers,
Growing with You

Metta Growing is Alana Brinnen's hands-on landscaping practice in Smithers, BC. After years of working the land and nurturing her own green spaces, Alana turned her passion into a full-service landscaping company dedicated to the Bulkley Valley community.

Every project — whether it's a new garden bed, a stone patio, or a tray of custom herb starts — gets the same care and attention. Metta Growing is small by design, allowing Alana to bring her expertise and personal touch to every client relationship.

Learn Our Story
Simple Process

How We Work

From first conversation to finished project, we make it easy and stress-free.

01

Free Consultation

We visit your property, understand your vision, and discuss options. No pressure, just good conversation.

02

We Plan Together

You receive a clear proposal with scope, timeline, and transparent pricing. No hidden fees.

03

We Do the Work

Alana and her team arrive on schedule and work with care. Clean, professional, detail-oriented.

04

You Enjoy the Results

We do a final walkthrough together. Not done until you love it.

Book Your Free Consultation
Happy Clients

What Our Clients Say

"Alana transformed our overgrown backyard into something we're actually proud of. She was professional, on time, and the results speak for themselves. Highly recommend Metta Growing."
S
Sarah K.
Smithers, BC — Landscape Installation
"We had Alana install a paved patio and it exceeded our expectations. The attention to detail was incredible, and she was so easy to work with throughout the whole process."
M
Mike & Janet T.
Telkwa, BC — Patio Installation
